creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Retrospective (2001-10-15): 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/www/gallery2/pkg-descr?id=6bc217d39843e359e01ed03499f2c4277cfc860d>

Via <https://web.archive.org/web/20220000000000*/http://gallery.sourceforge.net/> I found a 2001 capture of a Gallery-related page: 

* <https://web.archive.org/web/20010812062941/http://www.menalto.com:80/projects/gallery/index.php>

HTTP   <http://www.menalto.com/projects/gallery/index.php> now redirects to 
HTTPS <https://www.menalto.com/projects/gallery/index.php>, 404 not found.
